figures.caption: Table 3: DocILE results. KILE: Key Information Line-level Extraction (exact-match on key fields, e.g. invoice number, date, total). LIR: Line Item Recognition (accuracy on structured line items). Code Factory makes compiled LLM calls; Deterministic uses pure regex.

Figure 1: Token consumption comparison across baselines (BFCL, n=400). Compiled AI incurs a one-time 9,600-token generation cost, then executes at zero marginal cost. Break-even vs. Direct LLM at n∗ ≈ 17; at 1,000 transactions, compiled AI reduces consumption by 57× vs. Direct LLM and 84× vs. AutoGen.
